title: justfile recipes + docs/README for CLI & server
description: Add serve/build-cli/test-cli recipes; neutral docs page + README section; document cargo binstall nidus and cargo install nidus --features cli.
close_reason: justfile cli recipes + docs guide + README/CLAUDE.md updates

title: Release: cross-target binary matrix + binstall notes
description: Add build-binaries matrix (linux x86_64/aarch64 via cross, macOS aarch64, windows x86_64), package nidus-<target>.tar.gz/.zip, upload to GitHub release, cargo binstall nidus in notes.
close_reason: CI cli jobs added; release binary matrix + binstall notes added

title: Implement nidus serve (axum+tokio HTTP API)
description: Long-lived server wrapping Arc<Mutex<Nidus>> + spawn_blocking. Endpoints map 1:1 to public API (health, collections CRUD, meta, upsert, delete, records, search, flush, compact). Honor --read-only via OpenMode::ReadOnly. Wire DTOs defined in the feature layer (Hit/SearchOpts/Footprint mirrors).

title: CI: build/test the cli feature; keep core + Miri pure
description: Add --features cli clippy/test/build steps without disturbing the pure -p nidus jobs or the Miri job.
close_reason: CI cli jobs added; release binary matrix + binstall notes added

title: Implement CLI subcommands over a store directory
description: clap-based subcommands: collections/create/drop, upsert (JSON in), search (JSON query+opts), get, delete, compact, stats — operating on --dir/--dim, JSON out. Feature-gated module tree.

title: Add cli feature + binary scaffold to Cargo.toml
description: Add non-default 'cli' feature with optional deps (clap, tokio, axum, tower, serde_json), a [[bin]] name=nidus required-features=[cli], src/bin/nidus.rs, and [package.metadata.binstall]. Keep default features empty so cargo add nidus stays pure and just deps unchanged.

title: CLI + HTTP server mode for nidus
description: Add a non-default cli feature exposing a nidus binary: CLI over a store dir plus nidus serve (axum+tokio HTTP). Library stays pure (cargo add nidus = zero extra deps); cargo binstall nidus fetches prebuilt binaries. Includes binstall metadata, CI build/test of the feature, and a cross-target release binary matrix.
close_reason: CLI + server mode implemented, tested, documented; CI + release + binstall wired
